scoringPlays.text: Trebor Pena 73 Yd pass from Ethan Grunkemeyer (Quinton Martin Jr. Run for Two-Point Conversion)
Adam Randall 2 Yd Run (Nolan Hauser Kick)
Andrew Rappleyea 11 Yd pass from Ethan Grunkemeyer (Ryan Barker Kick)

videos.headline: Penn State defeats Clemson in the Pinstripe Bowl
videos.description: Penn State finishes the season on a high note as they take down Clemson in the Pinstripe Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Penn State defeats Clemson in the Pinstripe Bowl) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson opens Pinstripe Bowl with ugly fake punt attempt
videos.description: Clemson tries a fake punt, but there's miscommunication and the pass falls incomplete.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF OnePlay (Clemson opens Pinstripe Bowl with ugly fake punt attempt) 2025/12/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Ryan Barker makes 22-yard field goal) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dani Dennis-Sutton sacks Clemson QB Cade Klubnik for big loss
videos.description: Clemson quarterback Cade Klubnik gets sacked by Penn State defensive end Dani Dennis-Sutton.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dani Dennis-Sutton sacks Clemson QB Cade Klubnik for big loss) 2025/12/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Nolan Hauser makes 48-yard field goal) 2025/12/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Ryan Barker kicks 48-yard field goal) 2025/12/27 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Ryan Barker kicks 43-yard field goal) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trebor Pena makes catch, breaks free for 73-yard Penn State TD
videos.description: Ethan Grunkemeyer throws a dart to Trebor Pena, who breaks away for a Penn State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trebor Pena makes catch, breaks free for 73-yard Penn State TD) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Adam Randall scores rushing TD for Clemson
videos.description: Adam Randall completes a 2-yard rushing touchdown for Clemson and narrows Penn State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Adam Randall scores rushing TD for Clemson) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Grunkemeyer finds Rappleyea to extend Penn State's lead
videos.description: Ethan Grunkemeyer finds a wide-open Andrew Rappleyea, who brings in a touchdown for Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Grunkemeyer finds Rappleyea to extend Penn State’s lead) 2025/12/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Penn State interim coach gets drenched in grass, emotional about bowl win
videos.description: Penn State coach Terry Smith is showered with grass clippings after the win over Clemson in the Bad Boy Mowers Pinstripe Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interciew (Penn State interim coach gets drenched in grass, emotional about bowl win) 2025/12/27 ESHEET
